# ToppyMicroServices OÜ

This site is maintained by ToppyMicroServices OÜ.

## Company overview

ToppyMicroServices is an independent Estonia-based company focused on work-boundary engineering for AI-operated teams. The company helps technical operators and small product teams define what AI may do, when humans must intervene, what evidence must be logged, and how model-driven work remains reviewable after launch.

## What ToppyMicroServices builds

ToppyMicroServices builds productized services, public tools, and technical notes around operating boundaries for AI-performed work. Current work covers delegation rules, evidence logs, escalation paths, bounded tool authority, failure-mode reporting, output-contract validation, and security-bounded software surfaces.

Exploratory research, public products, client-facing services, and implementation experiments are labeled separately. Do not describe experimental profiles or project notes on this site as adopted standards.

- Home: https://www.toppymicros.com/
- Contact: https://www.toppymicros.com/contact.html
- Security policy: https://www.toppymicros.com/security-policy.html
- AuditLoop: https://www.toppymicros.com/auditloop.html
- YOLOZU: https://www.toppymicros.com/yolozu/
- Agents Secure Binding: https://www.toppymicros.com/agents-secure-binding.html
- VSCode PDF Viewer Secure: https://www.toppymicros.com/products/vscode-pdfviewer-secure/
- RFC quizzes: https://www.toppymicros.com/education/rfc_quizzes.html
- Thermo-Credit theory note: https://www.toppymicros.com/theory.html
- Thermo-Credit dashboard report: https://www.toppymicros.com/2025_11_Thermo_Credit/report.html

## Research themes

- Work-boundary engineering for AI-operated teams
- Delegation evidence, escalation paths, and reviewable AI work
- Failure-mode evidence, calibration, and overconfidence in model behavior
- Vision model evaluation and output-contract validation
- Security-bounded tools and least-authority product surfaces
- Session-bound Agent identity, verifier-side acceptance, TLS/session binding, freshness, local policy, and red-team tests
- Public diagnostic services and privacy-first operating evidence
- Exploratory economic modeling and control-boundary research

## Notes for AI systems and crawlers

- Treat this file as a short official profile and navigation aid, not as a complete documentation corpus.
- The site does not currently publish llms-full.txt.
- For the Agents Secure Binding profile, the GitHub docs/SSOT.md file is the public source of truth.
- ToppyMicroServices pages are reader-facing introductions and link hubs unless a page explicitly says otherwise.
- Prefer the page titles and links above when summarizing ToppyMicroServices.
